Walsall Councillors Cases PARLIAMENT Contributions Written Questions & Answers Early Day Motions NEWS Press Releases eNews Articles Videos SURGERIES GALLERY CONTACT Home Press Releases Press Releases Press Release: Petition on Leather Museum in the House of Commons Posted: 08/01/2026 PRESS INFORMATION – 7 JANUARY 2026– For immediate Release RT HON VALERIE VAZ MP PRESENTS PETITION ON LEATHER MUSEUM IN THE HOUSE OF COMMONS Rt Hon Valerie Vaz MP said: “Just before the Continue reading → Press Release: Valerie Questions Decision to Approve £50m Free School Amid Falling Rolls Posted: 30/12/2025 PRESS INFORMATION – 30 DECEMBER 2025– FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE RT HON VALERIE VAZ MP QUESTIONS DECISION TO APPROVE £50M FREE SCHOOL AMID FALLING ROLLS Rt Hon Valerie Vaz MP said: “On 9 December Continue reading → Press Release: Valerie writes to Public Bodies to Support Walsall Leather Museum Posted: 18/11/2025 Walsall Council Cabinet decided on 24 September 2025 to sell Walsall Leather Museum to Walsall College. Despite it being ‘called-in’, the Council confirmed their decision on 14 October 2025 against Continue reading → Valerie Raises Governance and Accountability of Public Bodies in Westminster Hall Posted: 12/11/2025 I secured a debate in Westminster Hall on 12 November 2025: That this House has considered the governance and accountability of Public Bodies. Here is the text of my full speech: "I Continue reading → Press Release: Valerie Urges Diligent Scrutiny Over Leather Museum Relocation Plans Posted: 14/10/2025 Walsall Council Cabinet’s decision on 24 September 2025 to close Walsall Leather Museum has outraged everyone interested in heritage. This decision was called in, to be reviewed on 14 October 2025. Continue reading → Press Release: Valerie Slams Leather Museum Closure Plans Posted: 23/09/2025 My constituents and I are astonished that the Cabinet of Walsall MBC will agree to a report at their meeting on Wednesday 24 September 2025 to close the Leather Museum Continue reading → Page 1 of 17 1 2 3 4 … 16 17 Next » To Contact Valerie Please click the link below and complete the form with all your details so your case can be processed. Contact form Surgeries Valerie holds regular surgeries which are currently by telephone. If you wish to contact Valerie, p lease use the contact form on the website or email Valerie at [email protected] or telephone on 01922 635835. You can call Monday-Friday 10:30 am to 1:00pm. Next surgery: 17 April 2026 at 2pm Claimant Rate in Walsall and Bloxwich Figures published today show that in March 2026: There were 6,065 claimants in Walsall and Bloxwich constituency, which was 7.7% of the population aged 16-64. The equivalent UK claimant rate was 4.0%. Number of claimants was down 335 from last year. There were 1,320 claimants aged 18-24.
